title: Systems Management Engineer
description:
Job Summary

We are seeking a skilled Systems Management / Systems Administrator to manage, support, and optimize both IT infrastructure and enterprise applications. The role focuses on ensuring system stability, performance, security, and smooth application operations.

Key Responsibilities

Infrastructure Management

  • Administer and maintain Windows and Linux servers (on-premise and cloud).
  • Manage virtualization platforms (VMware, Hyper-V) and cloud environments (AWS/Azure/GCP).
  • Monitor system health, performance, and capacity using enterprise monitoring tools.
  • Perform system patching, upgrades, backup, and disaster recovery activities.
  • Manage storage, backup, and recovery solutions.

Application Support & Management

  • Provide L2/L3 support for enterprise and business applications.
  • Install, configure, upgrade, and troubleshoot application platforms and middleware.
  • Manage application servers such as WebLogic, WebSphere, Tomcat, IIS, Apache, Nginx.
  • Coordinate with development teams and vendors for application issues, upgrades, and enhancements.
  • Support deployment activities and environment management (Dev, Test, UAT, Production).
  • Maintain system and application documentation, SOPs, and runbooks.

Operations & Governance

  • Handle incident, problem, and change management within ITIL processes during office hours.
  • Perform root cause analysis and implement preventive controls.
  • Automate routine administrative tasks using scripting (PowerShell, Bash, Python).
  • Support security audits, compliance, and regulatory requirements.
  • Collaborate with network, security, cloud, and business application teams.

Requirements

  • Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related discipline.
  • 3–7 years of experience in Systems Administration covering both infrastructure and applications.
  • Good relevant experience in:
  • Windows & Linux administration
  • Virtualization (VMware/Hyper-V)
  • Cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
  • Middleware and application servers
  • Backup, monitoring, and patch management tools
  • Knowledge of ITIL processes and service management tools.
  • Scripting and automation skills (PowerShell, Shell,Python).
  • Good understanding of security best practices and networking fundamental

postedCompany.description: Zenith Infotech (S) Pte Ltd. was started in 1997, primarily with the vision of offering state-of-the-art IT Professionals and solutions to various organizations and thereby helping them increase their productivity and competitiveness. From deployment of one person to formation of whole IT teams, Zenith Infotech has helped clients with their staff augmentation needs. Zenith offers opportunity to be engaged in long term projects with large IT savvy companies, Consulting organizations, System Integrators, Government, and MNCs.
postedCompany.name: ZENITH INFOTECH (S) PTE LTD.
